```{.tikz}
%%| width: 25%
\usetikzlibrary{arrows.meta}
\begin{tikzpicture}[every path/.style={->,>={Stealth},white,shorten <=2pt, shorten >= 2pt}]
    % \fill[blue!10] (current bounding box.south west)
    %               rectangle
    %               (current bounding box.north east);
  \foreach \x/\y/\z in {0/0/7, 0/1/4, 0/2/1, 1/0/6, 1/1/3, 1/2/0, 2/0/5, 2/1/3, 2/2/1}{
    \node[inner sep=1pt] (\x-\y) at (\x,\y) {\z};
  }
  \node[inner sep=1pt] (A) at (1,-1) {8};

  \foreach \x in {0,1,2} {
    \draw (\x-1) -- (\x-0);
    \draw (\x-2) -- (\x-1);
    \draw (\x-0) -- (A);
  }

  \draw (0-2) -- (1-0);
  \draw (1-2) -- (2-0);
  \draw[dotted] (2-2) to[bend right = 10] (0-0);
\end{tikzpicture}

```
